topic: Ask your 3 happiest customers for a Google review today
caption:
Your best customers want to help you. They just need to be asked.

Text 3 people today. Send a direct link to your Google review page.

Takes 10 minutes. Costs nothing. Works immediately.

When you're ready for a site that shows off those reviews, link in bio.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #LocalSEO #VeteranOwned #WebDesign #ShopLocal #GoogleReviews #LocalBusiness

copy.headline: Text 3 Customers Right Now for Reviews
copy.body: Google reviews are free word of mouth. One text to your happiest customers today can bring in your next job this week.
